urdu transliteration text:
LAHOO MEIN DOOBE YEH KARBALA HAINThis is Karbala, soaked in bloodEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Lahoo mein doobe yeh karbala hainJavan lasho se dashte sara bhara howa haiHai yeh karbala hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
This is Karbala, soaked in blood,
The whole desert is full of young bodies,
This is Karbala, this is Karbala.

When Husain brought the A’lam (flag) alone,
Every child clung to the A’lam (flag) and wept.

urdu transliteration text:
SAGIR ASGAR KO TEER MARECHENE SAKINA KE GOSH VAREYE KAISE ZULM AUR BHAR BHIRYAAT KI INTAHA HAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
They shot the baby Ali Asghar with an arrow,
And snatched away Sakina's earrings from her,
This is the height of injustice and barbarism

urdu transliteration text:
MERI NAVASE BE BERIDA HAINMERA NAVASA BHI BE KAFAN HAI RASOOL RO RO KE AMBIYA KO BHATA RAHA HAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
“My granddaughter is without a veil,
And my grandson is without a shroud",
Prophet (pbuh) is telling the other prophets, and weeping.

urdu transliteration text:
YE KHOON NE NA HAQ NA CHUP SAKE GAKABI YE MATAM NA ROK SAKE GA RUKE TO PHIR KARBALA BANE GE YE FASILA HAIN
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
This blood that was spilt unjustly will never stay hidden,
This Matam will never be stopped,
If it is stopped, then there will be another Karbala, this is the decision.
